title: Qwen3.5-0.8B GGUF layer-level AOTriton V3 full-attention prefill

change.summary: Added a GGUF full-attention layer prefill path that selects AOTriton V3 compact-varlen attention when rows meet the PrefillConfig-style attn_aotriton_min_tokens threshold.
implemented: added GGUF F32-weight multi-position q/k RMSNorm+RoPE kernel
added BF16 prompt KV append through KVLiveSpans
added BF16 AOTriton-output gate multiply for GGUF
caveats: This is a layer-level full-attention prefill path; public LLM.generate still uses resident token-serial prefill until the full GGUF scheduler/linear-attention bulk path lands.
AOTriton returns BF16 attention; the tiny fixture is correctness/launch evidence only, not a throughput row.
Rows>1 GGUF projection kernels are still GEMV-style surfaces and need P4 tuning before parity benchmarking.

layer_oracle.fixture: first Qwen3.5 GGUF full-attention layer (layer 3), prefix-hidden rows for fixture prompt tokens [760, 4087]

checks.threshold_modes: rows=2 with threshold=3 uses native_sequential; rows=2 with threshold=2 uses aotriton_v3
checks.final_hidden_allclose: AOTriton final row vs CPU bridge: rtol <= 0.20, atol <= 0.15
checks.lm_head_top1: AOTriton final-row top-1 equals CPU bridge top-1

rocprof_kernel_trace.command: env HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace --output-format csv --output-file gguf_task46 --output-directory /tmp/hipengine-gguf-task46-rocprof.lNVeqC -- python3 /tmp/profile_gguf_task46_aotriton.py

validation.targeted_tests_command: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_ops.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_full_attention_gpu.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_runner.py tests/test_llm_gguf_generate_path.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_tokenizer.py tests/test_gguf_e2e_acceptance.py tests/test_llm_generate.py tests/test_model_quant_and_imports.py tests/test_aotriton_discovery.py -q
